executives.name: Moira Smith
executives.background: Dr. Smith has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry, specializing in exploration and geology. She was previously the VP Exploration for Liberty Gold Corp. and has held senior positions with Teck Resources and Fronteer Gold.

executives.name: Navin Dyal
executives.background: Mr. Dyal was appointed Chief Financial Officer in 2022. He has over 20 years of experience in finance and mining, previously serving as CFO of Teranga Gold Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Moira Smith
board_of_directors.background: Dr. Smith has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry, specializing in exploration and geology. She was previously the VP Exploration for Liberty Gold Corp. and has held senior positions with Teck Resources and Fronteer Gold.

board_of_directors.name: Judith Mosely
board_of_directors.background: Judith Mosely has over 20 years of experience in the mining finance sector, including senior roles at Société Générale.
